title: Opendoor Q1 Earnings: What Wall Street Expects
text: Opendoor Technologies is set to report Q1 earnings on May 7. Wall Street analysts anticipate an earnings per share of -$0.09, showing improvement from -$0.12 in the prior year quarter. Revenue projections stand at approximately $666 million, representing a significant decline from the $1.15 billion reported in Q1 2025. Market Context: The stock currently trades around $5.11, down 12% year-to-date. Options traders are pricing in volatility of approximately 8.77% in either direction when results are announced. The ibuying sector faces headwinds from elevated mortgage rates, high home prices, and limited inventory. Mixed Signals from Q4: Recent quarterly results showed contradictory trends. Home acquisitions surged 46% quarter-over-quarter, and homes under contract jumped over 300%. However, gross margin contracted to 7.7%, contribution margin fell to 1%, and revenue dropped 20% sequentially.
